metadata.name: Artemis V archived/provider-specific NRHO proxy (representative 1 rev)
metadata.source: Derived from NASA public sample NRHO trajectory page (Lee 2019), NASA Gateway FAQ, and NASA/NTRS NRHO papers; representative cycle selected to match NASA public ~6.5 day 9:2 southern Gateway NRHO descriptions.
metadata.selection_method: Cycle chosen from the NASA sample because its period is close to 6.5 days and its closest approach is close to NASA's public ~1500 km minimum-altitude description for the sample NRHO.
metadata.use_case: Supports the archived/provider-specific Artemis V visualization only.
